images.description: Professional headshot of Andrea in a black blazer over a blue lace top, photographed outdoors with a blurred green background.
Professional headshot of Andrea in a navy blouse against a soft blurred autumn foliage background.
Professional studio headshot of Andrea in a gray top against a clean neutral gray backdrop.
Dark (navy) version of the Andrea Abella Marie brand logo featuring a meditating figure in a lotus.
Light (white) version of the Andrea Abella Marie brand logo featuring a meditating figure in a lotus.
White 15oz coffee mug with a black handle printed with the full Andrea Abella Marie logo and tagline, held against a wood floor background.
White ballpoint pen with black grip printed with the Andrea Abella Marie logo and name, photographed on a clean dark background.
Black crossbody shoulder bag embroidered with 'Resilience' and the Andrea Abella Marie logo, on a wood floor background.
Light blue insulated water bottle with flip lid printed with the logo and 'Resilience. Healing. One Day At a Time.', on a wood floor background.
Short white stainless steel tumbler with a clear lid printed with the gold and navy logo and tagline, on a wood floor background.
Silver compact umbrella fully open and printed with the Andrea Abella Marie logo, resting on a wood floor.
White circular branded carrying bag with strap showing the full Andrea Abella Marie logo and tagline, on a wood surface.
White spiral-bound notebook with the Andrea Abella Marie logo and tagline printed on the cover, on a wood surface.
Branded shot glass with logo and tagline displayed alongside a pair of dangle logo earrings on a wood surface.
Close-up of a pair of silver dangle earrings with circular logo medallion charm, on a wood background.
Cream white bucket hat with embroidered Andrea Abella Marie logo, photographed on a wood floor alongside logo earrings.
Front side of a cream bookmark with 'Andrea Abella Marie – Trauma-Informed Mindset Coach & Energy Healing Practitioner' text and a gold tassel, held in hand.
Back side of a cream bookmark featuring the dark logo icon with gold accents and a gold tassel, held in hand.
White square acrylic keychain printed with the full Andrea Abella Marie logo and tagline on a metal ring, held in hand.
Sage green long-sleeve button-up shirt with the Andrea Abella Marie logo embroidered on the chest, laid flat on a wood floor.
Tall white stainless steel tumbler with a straw lid printed with the gold and navy Andrea Abella Marie logo, held in hand against a wood background.
White structured snapback hat with the Andrea Abella Marie logo embroidered on the front panel, held in hand.
White short-sleeve button-up shirt with an allover repeating pattern of the Andrea Abella Marie meditating-figure logo, laid flat on a wood floor.
Black structured baseball cap with gold and white 'Resilience. Healing. One Day At a Time.' logo embroidered on the front, held in hand.
Black windbreaker jacket showing the back with the full Andrea Abella Marie logo and tagline printed in white and gold.
Black branded duffel/gym bag with white and gold Andrea Abella Marie logo and tagline on the front panel, on a wood floor.
Black zip-up hooded jacket with the Andrea Abella Marie logo on the left chest, laid flat on a wood floor.
